data.content: 1. [src/lib/doctor.ts:109](src/lib/doctor.ts:109) defines MANAGED_BLOCK_REGEX without the global flag, and [src/lib/doctor.ts:1368](src/lib/doctor.ts:1368) uses a single String.replace call. That only rewrites the first managed FOOLERY guidance block, so repos already polluted by duplicate managed blocks remain dirty after doctor --fix. This falls short of the requested clean upsert-style repair. 2. The regression test at [src/lib/__tests__/doctor-applyfix.test.ts:487](src/lib/__tests__/doctor-applyfix.test.ts:487) covers only a file with one existing managed block, so the duplicate-block case that triggered re-review is still untested.
